rationale: Strong alignment with candidate's Senior Data Engineer experience, Python/SQL expertise, and ETL design skills. Nice-to-have skills like PySpark and AWS Glue are also present.

job_facts.title: Principal Polar Orbit Data Reliability Engineer

responsibilities: Build robust data quality checks for simulation telemetry
Create scalable ETL jobs and schema contracts
Partner with platform team on SLOs, alerts, and runbooks
Drive reliability improvements and root-cause analysis
requirements_text: Must-have skills: Python, SQL, data modeling, ETL reliability, observability, incident response, and distributed processing
Nice-to-have: PySpark, AWS Glue, Apache Iceberg, and forecasting methods
risk_flags: Candidate lacks explicit experience with Apache Iceberg
Job focuses on polar-orbit simulations, which is outside candidate's direct domain experience

tailoring_plan.positioning_angle: Highlight extensive experience in designing automated ETL pipelines and optimizing data schemas, aligning with the job's focus on reliable ingestion and telemetry quality checks.
priority_experiences: Architected automated ETL pipelines (Python/Pandas) ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints (BMC TrueSight/TSCO), replacing legacy manual processes at CITI
Designed optimized Oracle schemas for historical retention, enabling seasonal risk forecasting at CITI
bullet_strategy: Emphasize hands-on ETL pipeline design and telemetry ingestion experience from CITI role
Highlight Python and SQL expertise as core strengths for data reliability tasks
Mention PySpark and AWS skills to address nice-to-have requirements
Frame forecasting experience (Prophet/scikit-learn) as relevant to anomaly detection and data quality checks
